programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Worst Best Man Ever
programme.desc: After Joey almost loses Ross' wedding ring, Ross asks both Joey and Chandler to serve as his best man; the girls host a baby shower for Phoebe.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel, Monica, Joey, Chandler and Ross go to London for the wedding where Joey meets Sarah Ferguson, the Duchess of York.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel frantically tries to get to London to tell Ross that she loves him before he marries Emily; Ross' parents argue with Emily's parents, Steven and Andrea Waltham.

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Phoebe Hates PBS

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: An exchange between Ross and Rachel threatens to break up the friends; Chandler and Monica plan a romantic weekend getaway together; Joey finds out about Monica and Chandler.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe is surprised to discover that she enjoys wearing mink; Ross confronts Emily, and she demands a divorce; Monica and Rachel are afraid of a hairy new neighbor, until they find out how handsome he is with his hair cut.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Moves In

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Thanksgiving Flashbacks
programme.desc: As the gang digests Monica's huge Thanksgiving meal, everyone reminisces about their worst Thanksgiving ever.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross becomes upset when someone at work takes his sandwich from the refrigerator and eats it; Joey finds himself in a mess when he tries to cover for Chandler and Monica's dating.

programme.desc: Danny's rocket-boosted pogo stick accidentally causes a fire; it's up to the entire Air Rescue team to save Danny and stop the forest from going up in flames; when Francois' big stunt show goes horribly awry, the Air Rescue pups are on a roll.

programme.sub-title: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Mighty Pups Versus the Copycat

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick have their peaceful day of jelly fishing disturbed by Sandy's competitive nature; SpongeBob pulls from Squidward's shirt a loose string that never seems to end.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick discovers that the rock he lives under is actually a sea turtle that overslept; old Man Jenkins disrupts business as usual at the Krusty Krab, but Mr. Krabs can't find a way to kick him out.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick discover a surprising link to their favorite Kelpbed Kid; chaos ensues as everyone in Bikini Bottom starts meeping.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: SpongeBob in RandomLand; SpongeBob's Bad Habit

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The place where Plankton usually dumps his rotten chum is too full, so he tricks SpongeBob into hiding it around the city; SpongeBob befriends a small storm cloud but has to protect it from a crazed weatherman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Boss for a Day; The Goofy Newbie
